calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-261 write-gate landing (env.step unpacking fix)
items.notes: Fix of EXQ-453 env.step unpacking bug (truncated was actually info dict -> break fired every step 0). C6 (coord_on_tick_live) FAILed in 0/2 COORD_ON seeds because only 6 total steps ran per seed. UC1-UC5 and C7 already PASS on the superseded run and are independent of the env loop. Dry-run confirms fix yields 20+ steps/ep.
